youtube_chapters:
0:00 Intro
0:12 Configure the slide
0:24 Preview and present live
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, all >=10s apart, validated against r7 (46.15s = 43.5s tutorial + 2.65s outro). Apply by pasting into YouTube video description at publish time. Also stored in using-the-open-ended-slide.chapters.txt.
notes: r7: Added oe-present step — after Preview results, back-to-editor animation shows and video ends on Present button in editor. Fixed outro: r6 used aha-outro-reusable-1440x900.webm (wrong), r7 uses splash_intro_BD.webm (correct). Re-recorded from scenario (9 steps), cut settings section (t=35.5-48.5s) same as r6. Added s09 VO at 40.0s. check_vo_overlap.py PASS. Single voice Liam. Video 43.5s (39s content + 4.5s back-to-editor+present). Branded outro splash_intro_BD.webm 2.65s appended. Total: 46.15s.

steps.display_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.
steps.tts_text: An Open Ended slide lets your audience answer in their own words.

steps.display_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Open Ended from the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.
steps.tts_text: Type your question. Make it specific to spark a real response.

steps.display_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.
steps.tts_text: Grid shows all responses at once. One by one reveals them individually.

steps.display_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.
steps.tts_text: Hit Preview to rehearse the slide and see the participant view before going live.

steps.display_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.
steps.tts_text: Participants type their answer and hit Submit. Responses arrive instantly.

steps.display_text: Answers appear live — this is what your audience sees on their devices.
steps.tts_text: Answers appear live — this is what your audience sees on their devices.

steps.display_text: When you're ready, hit Present to go live with your audience.
steps.tts_text: When you're ready, hit Present to go live with your audience.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i open-ended-r7-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s08.mp3 -i vo/s09.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6000|6000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10000|10000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15000|15000[a4];[5:a]adelay=20000|20000[a5];[6:a]adelay=24200|24200[a6];[7:a]adelay=29200|29200[a7];[8:a]adelay=35200|35200[a8];[9:a]adelay=40000|40000[a9];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9]amix=inputs=9:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k open-ended-r7-narrated.webm
